videos.headline: Jai'Den Thomas breaks free for a 70-yard TD
videos.description: Jai'Den Thomas weaves through the Idaho State defense to give UNLV a 14-10 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jai'Den Thomas breaks free for a 70-yard TD) 2025/08/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jai'Den Thomas rips off a 39-yard TD run
videos.description: Jai'Den Thomas takes it 39 yards to the end zone to make it a 10-7 game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jai'Den Thomas rips off a 39-yard TD run) 2025/08/23 ESHEET
